ssl_pas_bump.subject: [Inherited from thread]
ssl_pas_bump.body:
[First name],

Just wanted to make sure this landed — the 'Not Secure' warning on [specific URL] is still showing.

Happy to talk through the fix if useful.

[Your name]

mobile_pas_bump.subject: [Inherited from thread]
mobile_pas_bump.body:
[First name],

Just checking this got through — [business name]'s site is still not loading properly on a mobile screen.

Worth a quick look if you've got 10 minutes.

[Your name]

no_website_bab_bump.send_type: Thread reply (or new email if no reply-thread exists)
no_website_bab_bump.subject: [Inherited from thread, or: 'Following up — [Business name], [town]']
no_website_bab_bump.body:
Hi,

Following up on my note from a few days ago — when I search for '[trade] [town]' on Google, [business name] still isn't coming up.

Competitors with websites are getting those calls instead. Worth 10 minutes to chat?

[Your name]
personalisation: business name (all from Day-0 send records)

aida_keyword_gap_bump.allocation: ~5% of sends — test only (4.5★+ 100+ reviews only)

imap_handling_rules.if_clean: Send bump as templated. Log CHANGELOG.
imap_handling_rules.if_interested_reply_found: Send interested variant (see daily_email_plan.json). Write reply to new_replies.json. Classify in reply_classifications.json. Prepare proposal within 24 hours. Activate LinkedIn Day 7 hard deadline (2026-05-19).
imap_handling_rules.if_not_interested: Cancel bump. Suppress email channel. Block LinkedIn. Log CHANGELOG.
imap_handling_rules.if_unsubscribe: Cancel bump. Suppress within 24h (GDPR Article 21). Log audit_log and CHANGELOG.
imap_handling_rules.if_ooo: Note return date. Pause sequence. Resume bump day after stated return date.
imap_handling_rules.if_wrong_person: Cancel bump. Investigate correct contact. Log CHANGELOG.

day_7_new_angle.status: PENDING — brain generates copy Friday evening or Monday
day_7_new_angle.type: New angle — DIFFERENT pain point. Never restate Day-0 signal.
day_7_new_angle.brain_run: Friday 2026-05-15 evening (after HANDS returns linkedin_profiles.json) or Monday 2026-05-18 morning

day7_pivot_rules.if_day0_ssl: Day-7: Google ranking impact of Not Secure, OR missing/incomplete Google Business Profile. NEVER repeat SSL angle.
day7_pivot_rules.if_day0_mobile: Day-7: SSL (if HTTP), OR missing tap-to-call, OR specific local competitor who IS mobile-friendly.
day7_pivot_rules.if_day0_no_website: Day-7: competitors ranking for trade + town keyword, OR estimated missed enquiries per month.
day7_pivot_rules.rule: Day-7 MUST be a genuinely different pain point. A reframe of Day-0 does not perform (confirmed by campaign data).

day_7_new_angle.linkedin_hard_deadline: Tuesday 2026-05-19 — archive trigger fires immediately for any Batch 5 lead where LinkedIn not yet executed

day_14_breakup.type: 3 lines max. No pressure. No question marks. Door open.
